recent_events.detail: Brier/Log Loss computation implemented; 17/17 unit tests GREEN; CLI subcommand ready.
M1 attempted to parse 17-round AB-test data; data is judge scores (discrete 1-5) not prediction probabilities. Brier cannot be computed without a new round emitting predicted_p. stale_count=1.

5-persona review on P8 M1.5 calc_brier.py: median=5.0, sorted [4,5,5,6,6]. R4 (deepseek-v4-flash) again named the data-shape blocker (cross-confirms the M1 finding). R2+R5 noted 0.7/0.3 factor_update heuristic lacks probabilistic justification. Per methodology-scaffolding threshold (5.0 not 6.5), verdict=research_grade_acceptable.

m1_5_review_verdict.next_action: keep as paper-scoped tool; document known limitations; defer to methods paper or framework/ consolidation
